\tzpentry{ID4302}{Differential Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4302 introduces Differential Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{D}_{k+1}=\mathcal{D}_k+\eta\nabla_{\mathcal{D}} \left[-\sum_i w_i (E_i-E_i^*)^2\right]$
\]
